name: financials_save_amazon_statement_reconciliation_result
description:
Persist reconciliation results comparing an uploaded Amazon payments report (PDF) against classified settlement data. Writes a summary row and detail rows to Iceberg tables. Consequential (writes data).

Use cases:
- Persist the outcome of a PDF-vs-settlement comparison
- Record Match / Discrepancy / Unknown status per line item for audit
- Store explanatory memos for discrepancies

Reconciliation workflow:
1. User uploads a PDF payments report → LLM extracts dates, totals, and line items
2. LLM calls financials_classify_amazon_statement_transactions to pull classified settlement data for the same period
3. LLM compares the two and determines Match / Discrepancy / Unknown per line
4. LLM calls THIS tool to persist the comparison
5. Use financials_list_amazon_statement_reconciliation_results to retrieve and review saved results

ProTip: Use financials_list_amazon_statements to find settlement IDs and date ranges before calling financials_classify_amazon_statement_transactions.

What gets written:
- Summary row: overall totals (income, expenses, tax, transfers) + overall status
- Detail rows: per-category breakdown (category, item_description, debit/credit, per-row status, optional memo)

Status values: 'Match' (amounts agree within tolerance), 'Discrepancy' (amounts differ), 'Unknown' (could not map to a classification).

Safety / audit:
- dry_run=true (default): validates and returns a preview without persisting — always dry-run first
- write_mode='replace': deletes prior reconciliation for the same company_id + year before inserting
- Every write records author, reason, and timestamp for auditability

Author (important):
- If author.type='ai', author.name MUST be provided. Ask the user what name to record for audit (e.g., their name or team).

Partitioning: Both tables are partitioned by (company_id, year). The year is the report period year.

Knowledge base: https://help.neonpanel.com

year.description: Report year (e.g., 2025). Used for partitioning. Required.

author.description: Who/what is making this change (for audit). If type='ai', name MUST be provided (ask the user for their name or team).

name.description: Display name or agent name. Required when type='ai'.

id.description: Optional stable identifier (user id / agent id).

reason.description: Human-readable reason for this reconciliation (stored for audit). Be specific (minimum 10 characters).

dry_run.description: If true (default), validate and preview writes without persisting. Always dry-run first.

write_mode.description: append (default) inserts new rows; replace deletes existing rows for the same company_id + year before inserting.

debug_sql.description: If true during dry_run, include rendered SQL in meta.debug for troubleshooting. (Ignored when dry_run=false.)

summary.description: Reconciliation summary totals (one row per reconciliation).

legal_name.description: Legal entity name from the payments report.

total_income.description: Total income from the report (decimal, e.g., 123456.78).

category.description: Category/classification label matching the class hierarchy: 'Income', 'Amazon Fees', 'Cost of Advertising', 'Tax', 'Other'.

item_description.description: Line item description matching subclass labels: 'Product Sales', 'FBA Fees', 'Referral Fees', 'Sponsored Products', etc.

debit_amount.description: Debit amount (typically 0 or positive). Use 0 if not applicable.

credit_amount.description: Credit amount (typically 0 or positive). Use 0 if not applicable.

memo.description: Optional note explaining the status (e.g., discrepancy explanation, mapping note, tolerance note).

examples.title: Dry-run reconciliation
examples.description: Validate a reconciliation result before persisting (dry_run=true is the default).

request.reason: Monthly reconciliation of December 2025 Amazon payments report

details.memo: PDF shows 6200.00, settlement shows 6250.25 — possible late fee adjustment

examples.title: Replace existing reconciliation
examples.description: Overwrite a previously saved reconciliation for the same company + year.

request.reason: Corrected reconciliation after FBA fee adjustment was resolved
